log: === INITIATIVE ===
Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician: 12 (d20:10 + 2)
Young Red Dragon: 11 (d20:11 + 0)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 12] HIT! 16 damage. Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician HP: 141/157
→ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician HP: 52/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
⚡ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:2 total 12 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician's turn ---

Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician HP: 9/67
⚡ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:19 total 29 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 10 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician for 8. HP: 17/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
